question: How much did Vale S.A. agree to pay in the settlement for the Brumadinho dam disaster in 2021?
ground_truth: Vale S.A. agreed to pay 37.7 billion reals ($7.03 billion).
event_desc: Vale S.A. agrees to pay 37.7 billion reals ($7.03 billion) to settle the January 2019 Brumadinho dam disaster, where 270 people died.
